name: Chocolate Mint Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix chocolate cookie crumbs and melted butter/margarine. Press firmly into the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan (or pie pan). Bake for 7-8 minutes. Cool.
2. Use your electric mixer to prepare the filling. Cream butter/margarine until smooth and gradually add sugar. Melt chocolate over simmering water in a double boiler or in a microwave according to manufacturer's instructions. Combine melted chocolate with vanilla and peppermint extracts.
3. Beat cream until it holds a firm peak. Fold whipped cream into chocolate mixture.
4. Gently spread filling into prepared crust. Sprinkle with grated chocolate (or use chocolate sprinkles). Loosely cover with plastic wrap, making sure it doesn't touch the surface.
